name: 第1章第2話の川沿いパン屋背景
prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic environment image for a modern web novel. Emphasize atmosphere, lighting, believable architecture, realistic materials, and a unified live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets. Cinematic early-summer Sunday morning riverside street leading from a small bakery toward the White Heron River promenade. Show clean bridge railings, open sky, a quiet walkway, paper bread bags, warm fresh light, and only sparse weekend foot traffic. The place should feel breathable, slightly refined, and naturally inviting for a slow holiday walk. Final delivery will be cropped to 1920x1080. Keep the main focal area centered with safe margins and leave enough side information for widescreen composition. Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, character close-up, deformed architecture, low detail, combat, action pose, readable text, collage, split panel, heavy crowd, obvious threat, festival chaos, tourist overload
